name: Succotash
recipeIngredient: 20 oz Frozen Fordhook lima beans, thawed
20 oz Frozen whole kernel corn, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place lima beans and corn in a large, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl.
2. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 12 minutes or until vegetables are hot.
3. Add remaining ingredients and stir to combine. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 4 minutes or until heated through.
